author: anon-13168fa2
content: Plan: Write 03-real-world-skills/04-shipping-it.md. Two major sections: Testing (the larger half) and Delivery. Testing covers: unit tests, integration tests, smoke tests, property-based tests, formal verification. For each: what it is, what it catches, when you need it. Critical agent-specific issue: tautological tests (testing that the code does what the code does, not what it should do). Tests themselves need adversarial review. Edge case hunting as a skill. Cross-platform testing with VMs. Delivery covers: cargo publish, GitHub releases, cross-compilation, packaging, the gap between 'it works' and 'someone else can use it'. Update README.
